div.class: o_action_manager o_crm_custom_dashboard pb-5 overflow-auto bg-100 h-100

button.class: btn btn-primary btn-lg rounded-pill fw-bold shadow border-0 px-4 py-2 text-white d-inline-flex align-items-center

div.class: alert o_smart_alert shadow border-0 mb-0 d-flex flex-column gap-2
div.style: background: rgba(254, 226, 226, 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-left: 5px solid #ef4444 !important; border-radius: 12px;

div.class: bg-white text-danger px-3 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold d-flex align-items-center gap-2
bg-white text-danger px-3 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold d-flex align-items-center gap-2 o_hover_lift
bg-white text-danger px-3 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold d-flex align-items-center gap-2

t.div: Drop in conversions vs last week ( → )

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 h-100 text-white o_revenue_card
card shadow-sm border-0 bg-primary text-white h-100 o_hover_lift
bg-white bg-opacity-25 p-3 rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
card shadow-sm border-0 bg-warning text-dark h-100 o_hover_lift
card-body p-3 text-center d-flex flex-column justify-content-center
card shadow-sm border-0 bg-info text-white h-100 o_hover_lift
card-body p-3 text-center d-flex flex-column justify-content-center
card-header bg-white border-0 pt-4 pb-0 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.t-attf-class: p-4 rounded-4 shadow-sm flex-fill text-center {{text_color}} o_heatmap_card
div.t-attf-style: min-width: 160px; background-color: hsl({{hue}}, 75%, 45%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); cursor: pointer;
div.t-on-click: () => perf.user_id ? this.openLeadsList([['user_id', '=', perf.user_id]], perf.user + ' Leads') : this.openLeadsList([['user_id', '=', false]], 'Unassigned Leads')

div.class: badge bg-white bg-opacity-25 rounded-pill px-3 py-2 mt-2
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-end h-100 w-100 mt-2 px-3 pb-3 border-bottom

div.t-attf-style: background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3b82f6 0%, #2563eb 100%); width: 20px; height: {{ (state.data.time_trends.activities[label_index] / max_val) * 100 }}%; min-height: 4px;
background: linear-gradient(180deg, #10b981 0%, #059669 100%); width: 20px; height: {{ (state.data.time_trends.admissions[label_index] / max_val) * 100 }}%; min-height: 4px;

div.t-on-click: () => src.source_id ? this.openLeadsList([['source_id', '=', src.source_id]], src.source + ' Leads') : this.openLeadsList([['source_id', '=', false]], 'Unknown Source Leads')

div.t-attf-style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #34d399 0%, #10b981 100%); width: {{ won_pct }}%; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(16,185,129,0.5);

div.class: card-body d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center py-4

t.t-value: (st.includes('won') || st.includes('admission')) ? 'linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981 0%, #059669 100%)' : (st.includes('lost') || st.includes('junk') || st.includes('not intrested')) ? 'linear-gradient(90deg, #ef4444 0%, #dc2626 100%)' : funnel_colors[f_index % funnel_colors.length]

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center text-white fw-bold shadow-sm mb-2 position-relative o_funnel_stage
div.t-attf-style: background: {{bg_style}}; width: {{width_pct}}%; height: 48px; clip-path: polygon(5% 0%, 95% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); transition: transform 0.3s; cursor: pointer;

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 position-relative h-100 o_notes_card

textarea.class: form-control border-0 bg-transparent text-dark w-100 p-0 fs-5 fw-medium
textarea.placeholder: Jot down quick thoughts, reminders, or goals here...

div.class: card-header bg-white border-0 pt-4 pb-0 d-flex justify-content-between

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 rounded-3 shadow-sm border-0 bg-light

span.class: badge bg-danger text-white rounded-pill px-3 py-2 shadow-sm

div.class: d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center h-100 py-5 text-muted

i.class: fa fa-check-circle-o fa-4x mb-3 text-success opacity-50

div.class: card-header bg-white border-0 pt-4 pb-0 d-flex justify-content-between

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 rounded-3 shadow-sm border-0 bg-light

span.class: badge bg-warning text-dark rounded-pill px-3 py-2 shadow-sm

div.class: d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center h-100 py-5 text-muted
div.p: No team activities pending this week.

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-success border-4 h-100 o_hover_lift
card-body p-4 text-center d-flex flex-column justify-content-center
badge bg-light text-dark shadow-sm border rounded-pill px-3 py-2 mt-2 mx-auto
card-body p-4 text-center d-flex flex-column justify-content-center
card-body p-4 text-center d-flex flex-column justify-content-center
card-body p-4 text-center d-flex flex-column justify-content-center
card-header bg-white border-0 pt-4 pb-0 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
bg-white border-top border-4 border-danger shadow-sm rounded-4 p-3 h-100

button.class: btn btn-light text-start p-2 rounded-3 shadow-sm border border-danger border-opacity-25 o_hover_lift

div.class: bg-white border-top border-4 border-warning shadow-sm rounded-4 p-3 h-100

button.class: btn btn-light text-start p-2 rounded-3 shadow-sm border border-warning border-opacity-25 o_hover_lift

div.class: bg-white border-top border-4 border-secondary shadow-sm rounded-4 p-3 h-100

button.class: btn btn-light text-start p-2 rounded-3 shadow-sm border border-secondary border-opacity-25 o_hover_lift

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-warning border-4

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-warning fw-bold text-dark rounded-pill shadow-sm

div.class: border-bottom pb-3 mb-1 border-warning border-opacity-25 border-1

div.p: Click generate to scan your pipeline for actionable advice.

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 bg-dark text-white o_hover_lift

i.class: fa fa-bullseye fa-4x position-absolute top-0 end-0 opacity-10 mt-n2 me-n2 text-white

div.t-attf-class: list-group-item border-0 py-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center {{ rep.user_id == session.uid ? 'bg-primary bg-opacity-10' : '' }}

h6.class: card-title fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wide mb-0

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 bg-light rounded-3

div.p: Failed to load dashboard data. Please try refreshing.
